free_text: responses in Sn-115 and Sn-119 via the (d,t) reaction
A Sn-116 target, 97.5% enriched and a Sn-120 target,
corresponding deuteron polarized state were analyzed by
the high resolution spectrometer-SPESI. Energy loss and
time of flight of the detected particles were
continuously monitor the beam current. Systematic
errors in the calibration are less than 15%.
*By authors*.Calibration of the low energy polarimeter
with dead time corrections my account for 5% systematic
error on the measured analyzing powers.
Correction for the background is indicated.
distributions were deduced and compared with previous
